baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Deploy this project to Vercel using the token in my environment.
evals.expected_output: A Vercel CLI workflow that locates token/project/team state safely, avoids exposing the token, and deploys a preview by default.
assertions: Uses VERCEL_TOKEN from the environment instead of --token.
Reports deployment URL and status inspection.
